action_set_definitions.name: get_job_description
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the detailed job description and requirements for the current screening project.

example_output.requirements: P&L $200M-$800M, PMI synergy evidence, Equity buyout < $1M

action_set_definitions.name: list_candidates
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of all candidates currently in the pool, including their IDs and current status.

action_set_definitions.name: view_candidate_resume
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full resume text for a specific candidate. Calling this tool automatically updates the environment's access_log for the given ID.

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier of the candidate.

action_set_definitions.name: update_candidate_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates a candidate's status to either 'shortlisted' or 'rejected'. This action also updates the global screening_metrics.

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier of the candidate.

status.description: The new status to assign to the candidate.

action_set_definitions.name: get_system_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current screening metrics and access logs to verify session activity and final counts.

state_description.job_description: The specific requirements, responsibilities, and qualifications for the position being screened for.
state_description.candidate_pool: A list of candidate objects containing candidate_id, resume_text, and current_status.
state_description.screening_metrics: Counters for the number of candidates screened, shortlisted, or rejected in the current session.
state_description.access_log: A history of which candidate IDs have been viewed by the agent to prevent redundant processing.

task_initial_state.job_description: Project Apollo: Chief Operating Officer (COO) for a $400M PE-backed industrial manufacturing firm. Requirements: P&L scale $200M-$800M, documented PMI synergy realization, and buyout budget cap of $1,000,000.

candidate_pool.resume_text: Name: Marcus Vane. Current Role: COO at Titan Indus. Managed $480M P&L. Executed integration of two regional rivals, delivering $14M in annual supply chain synergies over 15 months. Unvested LTI: $650,000.
Name: Linda Horth. Current Role: CEO at Micro-Fab. Managed $15M P&L. Strong background in venture-backed growth. Unvested LTI: $45,000.

Name: Steven Grant. Current Role: VP Operations at Global Corp. Managed $1.2B P&L. Led the acquisition of Delta Co in Jan 2024; left in March 2024 to pursue new opportunities. Unvested LTI: $2,500,000.

Name: Julia Ross. Current Role: SVP at HeavyMach. Managed $350M P&L. Oversaw the merger with Steel-Works; resume indicates 'successfully closed deal' but lists no integration or synergy metrics. Unvested LTI: $800,000.
